title.en: China-to-Bahrain EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Bahrain BSMD standards screening, IEC 61851 conductive charging system requirements, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector incompatibility with China GB/T 20234 connectors, EWA grid-connection requirements under the 2025 MEWA EV charging framework, and 50 Hz site requirements versus China GB/T 18487.1-2023.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电设备文件与巴林BSMD标准筛查、IEC 61851传导充电系统要求、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口与中国GB/T 20234接口不兼容问题、2025年MEWA充电框架下EWA并网要求和50Hz场址要求，以及中国GB/T 18487.1-2023差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電設備文件與巴林BSMD標準篩查、IEC 61851傳導充電系統要求、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口與中國GB/T 20234接口不相容問題、2025年MEWA充電框架下EWA併網要求和50Hz場址要求，以及中國GB/T 18487.1-2023差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSMD scope determination, EWA grid-connection approval, MEWA EV charging framework approval, fire-safety approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bahrain BSMD, EWA, MEWA EV framework, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSMD适用范围裁定、EWA并网批准、MEWA充电框架批准、消防安全批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴林BSMD、EWA、MEWA充电框架、海关和项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSMD適用範圍裁定、EWA併網批准、MEWA充電框架批准、消防安全批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴林BSMD、EWA、MEWA充電框架、海關和項目要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Bahrain, the critical connector incompatibility must be addressed first: Bahrain vehicles and infrastructure follow IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC fast charging), which are physically incompatible with China's GB/T 20234.2-2015 (AC) and GB/T 20234.3-2023 (DC) connectors. Chargers designed for the Chinese domestic market cannot be sold in Bahrain without hardware redesign for IEC 62196-compliant connectors. Additionally, Bahrain introduced a comprehensive EV charging regulatory framework through MEWA in November 2025, granting EWA authority to set technical and safety standards, approve grid connections, and maintain a national register of all EV charging equipment. IEC 61851 conductive charging system compliance and 50 Hz grid settings are expected.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备出口巴林时，必须首先解决关键的接口不兼容问题：巴林车辆和基础设施采用IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流快充），与中国GB/T 20234.2-2015（交流）和GB/T 20234.3-2023（直流）接口物理不兼容。面向中国国内市场设计的充电设备在不更换IEC 62196兼容接口硬件的情况下，无法在巴林销售。此外，巴林于2025年11月通过MEWA引入了全面的电动汽车充电监管框架，授权EWA制定技术和安全标准、审批并网连接并维护全国充电设备登记册。预期须符合IEC 61851传导充电系统要求和50Hz并网整定。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備出口巴林時，必須首先解決關鍵的接口不相容問題：巴林車輛和基礎設施採用IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流快充），與中國GB/T 20234.2-2015（交流）和GB/T 20234.3-2023（直流）接口物理不相容。面向中國國內市場設計的充電設備在不更換IEC 62196相容接口硬件的情況下，無法在巴林銷售。此外，巴林於2025年11月通過MEWA引入了全面的電動汽車充電監管框架，授權EWA制定技術和安全標準、審批併網連接並維護全國充電設備登記冊。預期須符合IEC 61851傳導充電系統要求和50Hz併網整定。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, standards publisher, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
